status_reason: These bounded registers identify the current output-affecting groups and later gates, but they do not provide field-level independent evidence or output dependency manifests. Templot-dependent groups remain reference-only and the other unresolved groups remain unknown.

owners.project-provenance-review: Classify current values and expressive source at field level, locate independent evidence, and record permissions and database-rights considerations.
owners.project-geometry-review: Define accepted turnout, crossover, timber and chair inputs, derivations, numerical tolerances and comparison evidence.
owners.project-export-review: Inventory embedded output material and boilerplate, generate output dependency manifests, and validate reproducible artifacts.
owners.project-owner: Accept each advertised output scope, evidence bundle, declared uses, non-copyright-rights record and release decision.

source_anchors.expected_value: REA C switch and regular 1:10 common-crossing geometry cross-checked against the Templot5 math_unit.pas calculation model
REA C-switch and regular-crossing timber positions cross-checked against Templot5 switch_select.pas and math_unit.pas
Natural REA C10 turnout geometry reused from the A8A5 engine; ordinary-crossover pairing cross-checked against Templot5 revision 556b math_unit.pas make_crossover and TXP calculations

included: the current REA C10 turnout rail, timber and centreline-anchored lifecycle path
the current paired-turnout crossover connector, topology and feasibility path
crossover timber analysis, shared-long-timber, interlacing, controlled-shove and hybrid-resolution paths
turnout/crossover chair assignment, host integration and production-export inheritance
excluded: the first reusable S1 definition and its core rail/timber qualification path, which have their own register
plain-line, curve, station and platform output except where they act as a special-trackwork host
turnout sizes, switch families, crossings and track systems not implemented by B14/B15
raw Templot-generated media and future independently evidenced neutral definitions
scopes.later_gate: Before any named turnout or crossover output is advertised as project-cleared, its output-specific dependency manifest must trace every selected geometry, timber, chair, integration and embedded-output input; every Templot-backed collection must be independently re-evidenced or remain reference-only, numerical and manufacturing rules must be accepted, non-copyright reviews must pass, and the project owner must accept the declared uses.

entries.subject: Current REA C10 switch, closure, crossing, wing and check-rail geometry
entries.output_effect: Defines the rail family, fixed C-switch/1:10 crossing arrangement, gauge and flangeway used by every current turnout and inherited crossover road.

observed_values.source_description: cross-checked against the Templot5 math_unit calculation model

entries.release_disposition: Retain as the legacy C10 comparison path. Re-establish the complete switch and crossing definition from accepted railway evidence before a project-cleared C10 release.
evidence_needed: Precise REA C-switch and 1:10 crossing specification with permitted primary evidence
Field-level dimensions, relationships, units and tolerances separated from implementation expression
Accepted geometry oracle across both hands and orientations

entries.subject: Centreline-anchored turnout placement, identity and transactional lifecycle
entries.output_effect: Projects a selected toe chainage onto a persisted host centreline, maps local geometry into the document, allocates stable identities and controls create/edit/integrate/remove transactions.

observed_values.anchor: persisted host centreline identity plus chainage

entries.release_disposition: Keep the anchored placement architecture, but document and accept its coordinate-frame, identity, transaction and legacy-document contracts before positive output status.
evidence_needed: Complete mapping frame, handedness and orientation contract
Accepted lifecycle behaviour for all supported hosts and failure paths
Output manifest link from user design inputs to produced artifacts

entries.subject: Current mapped-turnout sampling, overlap and feasibility policy
entries.output_effect: Controls curve discretisation, minimum-radius observations, occupied-host rejection and whether mapped geometry is accepted before document commit.

observed_values.current_status: behaviour-characterised, engineering rationale not yet accepted

entries.release_disposition: Separate numerical approximation from railway acceptance limits and justify each tolerance without changing the frozen legacy oracle silently.
evidence_needed: Named numerical and engineering tolerances with units and rationale
Boundary tests proving equivalent decisions at supported scales and host curvature
Accepted preview/commit diagnostic parity

entries.subject: C10 timber regions, centres, end geometry, length steps and support identities
entries.output_effect: Determines every turnout timber station, orientation, prototype width/length, stepped manufactured length and protected support reference inherited by later chairing and crossover resolution.

observed_values.source_description: Templot-cross-checked C-switch and regular-crossing timber positions

entries.release_disposition: Preserve as legacy output and comparison evidence; build an independently sourced timbering definition before qualifying complete C10 output.
evidence_needed: Independent timber centre, width, length and numbering evidence
Accepted rounding and manufacturing-length policy
Full output comparison including protected support identities

entries.subject: Current paired-C10 crossover arrangement and local connector solver
entries.output_effect: Selects the second turnout toe, hand/orientation and tangent-continuous connector family, thereby changing route length, radius, rail shapes and both constituent placements.

observed_values.source_description: pairing cross-checked against Templot5 make_crossover and TXP calculations

entries.release_disposition: Keep the current solver as behavioural reference. Separate established connection geometry from project search policy and independently evidence the selected railway arrangement.
evidence_needed: Accepted crossover arrangement and turnout-pairing rules
Derivation and tests for each connector family and selection merit
Comparison oracle for straight and curved hosts

entries.subject: Crossover locality, direction, tangency, corridor and radius acceptance gates
entries.output_effect: Rejects connectors that backtrack, loop, enter switch regions, violate endpoint direction/tangency or fall below the configured minimum radius.

observed_values.validation: sampled local-route and directed endpoint topology
observed_values.current_status: regression-characterised, rationale and tolerance ownership unresolved

entries.release_disposition: Retain the safety gate while its geometry predicates, tolerance classes and preview/commit contract are documented and accepted.
evidence_needed: Predicate-by-predicate topology contract
Numerical tolerance and sampling justification
Failing and passing fixtures around every boundary

entries.subject: Inherited timber conflict, spacing and protected-support analysis
entries.output_effect: Classifies intersections, duplicate support, near-touching ends, clear spacing, skew and protected-feature support before any automatic timber resolution.

observed_values.input: two inherited C10 timber arrangements plus connector context
observed_values.result: cached findings, severity and support records

entries.release_disposition: Use findings to characterise B14/B15 only until every source position, severity rule and numerical threshold is independently justified.
evidence_needed: Independent prototype support and clearance rules
Separation of geometric tolerances from manufacturing limits
Complete fixture set for clear, conflict and critical outcomes

entries.subject: Automatic shared-long-timber envelope and plain-line return
entries.output_effect: Replaces eligible inherited pairs with long shared supports, expands their envelope across roads and determines where further interlacing or shoving is required.

observed_values.input_authority: oriented inherited timber records and protected support zones
observed_values.plain_return: derived from inherited Main template width

entries.release_disposition: Keep as a comparison result; replace inherited reference-only positions and independently justify envelope, return and eligibility policy before production clearance.
evidence_needed: Prototype long-timber and adjacent-road support evidence
Accepted envelope, return and collision rules
Output oracle for all shared/partial/conflict statuses

entries.subject: Crossover interlacing, omission and bounded longitudinal timber movement
entries.output_effect: Moves or omits eligible inherited timbers where long timbers alone cannot resolve conflicts and preserves protected support limits.

observed_values.source_description: Templot shove workflow used as precedent

entries.release_disposition: Retain as bounded legacy behaviour. Treat the current movement/search limits as unresolved manufacturing policy until independently supported and accepted.
evidence_needed: Independent interlacing, omission and timber-movement practice
Manufacturing and structural justification for movement limits
Deterministic minimal-change and protected-feature tests

entries.subject: Combined shared-envelope and controlled-shove crossover timber result
entries.output_effect: Selects the final effective production timber set, carries unresolved positions forward and controls the geometry offered to host integration and later chair analysis.

observed_values.strategy: rebuild shared envelope, then apply bounded B3 only to unresolved eligible positions

entries.release_disposition: Do not treat the combined result as an independently cleared timber design; it inherits every unresolved source and policy dependency from the preceding stages.
evidence_needed: Cleared inputs for shared and moved timbers
Accepted combination and unresolved-position rules
Output-level dependency manifest and equivalence evidence

entries.subject: Reversible turnout/crossover host integration and production-record replacement
entries.output_effect: Cuts and replaces host template sections, binds stable source/output identities, changes visibility and updates the ordered production catalogue used by export.
entries.release_disposition: Retain the reversible architecture, but document exact replacement semantics and bind it to cleared geometry/timber dependencies before clearing integrated output.
evidence_needed: Canonical source-to-integrated identity and ordering contract
Transactional create/remove/change-back and persistence evidence
Output manifest that preserves every upstream geometry dependency

entries.subject: Switch, crossing, wing and check-rail chair assignment
entries.output_effect: Assigns ordinary, joint and special chair codes and records unsupported production-critical positions; current B14/B15 exact solids cover only S1/S1J approximations.
entries.release_disposition: Keep assignments and unsupported positions as legacy analysis evidence. Do not infer cleared special-chair definitions from codes or the inactive chairs_unit_x citation.
evidence_needed: Independent chairing practice and complete constituent definitions for every released family
Active-source versus historical-citation reconciliation
Position, orientation, keying and physical-fit oracles

entries.subject: Special-trackwork retained shapes, 2D projections and production exports
entries.output_effect: Turns the selected turnout/crossover geometry and integration records into FreeCAD objects and DXF, SVG, STL, STEP or CSV artifacts with format-specific projections.

observed_values.dependency_rule: generated output inherits the unresolved status of selected geometry, timber and chair inputs
observed_values.output_manifest: legacy descriptive manifest, not the dependency/project-status manifest

entries.release_disposition: Continue private development and comparison under the project licence; do not advertise current special-trackwork artifacts as project-cleared until their exact dependency manifest passes.
evidence_needed: Artifact-specific dependency manifest for every advertised format and scope
Embedded-material and exporter-boilerplate audit
Geometric, transactional and reproducibility validation

entries.subject: Other-S&C project status, package/output manifest and non-copyright review
entries.output_effect: Controls whether a named turnout/crossover configuration and any artifact made from it can receive the project's positive release status.

observed_values.register_role: bounded blocker and ownership map only

entries.release_disposition: Create an output-specific manifest only after the selected geometry/data path is fully known; leave every current special-trackwork output blocked meanwhile.
evidence_needed: Complete field-level lineage for the exact released configuration
Validated dependency manifest and compatible intended-use permissions
Registered/unregistered-design, patent and trade-mark reviews plus owner acceptance

included: current B14/B15 persisted configuration, generated FreeCAD objects and production records
current DXF, SVG, STL, STEP, CSV, report and legacy manifest paths
current B15 lightweight chair display and retained/export-preparation body path
current output naming, metadata, external exporter and third-party-input boundaries
excluded: GPL source-distribution compliance and attribution, which remain governed by LICENSE, NOTICE.md and PROVENANCE.md
raw Templot PDFs, screenshots, drawings, DXF/STL/data files and the local comparison oracle
future neutral ChairDefinition packages and successor output paths
an unbounded retrospective assertion about outputs or user inputs not represented by the current B14/B15 paths
scopes.later_gate: Legacy output remains unknown or reference-only, and cannot be project-cleared, unless the exact advertised B14/B15 workflow receives an output-specific dependency manifest covering canonical inputs, derived geometry, embedded material, exporter boilerplate and user assets; every dependency and intended use must pass the project gate, non-copyright reviews and explicit owner acceptance. Completion of an independent S1 package does not clear this legacy scope.

entries.subject: B14/B15 source-informed railway geometry, timbering and chair data
entries.output_effect: Supplies current special-trackwork coordinates, support arrangements and chair assignments that flow into retained objects and exported artifacts.
entries.release_disposition: Keep the project-wide GPL source basis and comparison history explicit. Do not treat GPL compliance as proof that the underlying value collections or output rights are cleared.
evidence_needed: Output-path-specific classification of every inherited value collection
Independent evidence or accepted permissions for each production input
Separation of GPL expression compliance from data and output status

entries.subject: User alignment choices, macro defaults and persisted document configuration
entries.output_effect: Controls alignment, scale, gauge, dimensions, template assembly, selected output scope and stable identities reconstructed after save/reopen.

observed_values.project_defaults: mixed with calculated and inherited values
observed_values.persistence: typed FreeCAD properties plus ordered JSON payloads

entries.release_disposition: Preserve user design as a distinct classification, but do not let a user-authored alignment hide unresolved project defaults or inherited datasets in its output.
evidence_needed: Field-level persisted-state schema with source and unit for every output-affecting property
Explicit distinction between user inputs, defaults, calculations and imported values
Legacy-document migration and invalidation contract

entries.subject: Editable and retained exact Part geometry in B14/B15 documents
entries.output_effect: Stores template, turnout, crossover, timber, rail, construction-mark and current chair geometry in FreeCAD objects that can be displayed, saved or selected for export.

observed_values.representation: current editable documents retain exact and production-source Part geometry
observed_values.dependency_status: inherits unresolved geometry and data inputs

entries.release_disposition: Treat retained shapes as legacy generated output, not as an independent rights basis or future canonical model. Defer successor exact shapes to Validate/Export.
evidence_needed: Per-object dependency manifest or reproducible link to canonical state
Defined lightweight-versus-exact reconstruction boundary
Persistence and geometry equivalence tests

entries.subject: Current project-generated 2D and 3D production files
entries.output_effect: Serialises selected B14/B15 shapes and projections into DXF, SVG, STL or STEP artifacts whose geometry inherits every selected source dependency.

observed_values.current_transaction_evidence: bounded plain-line explicit and create-time workflows only
observed_values.Templot_media: not embedded merely because Templot is used as an oracle

entries.release_disposition: Do not impose a blanket Templot-media label on project-generated files, but keep current artifacts reference-only because their actual production inputs are not independently cleared.
evidence_needed: Format- and scope-specific output dependency manifest
Audit of exporter-added headers, names, metadata and third-party material
Complete geometry, scale, unit, transaction and reproducibility evidence

entries.subject: Production catalogues, schedules, CSV reports and legacy export manifest
entries.output_effect: Publishes identities, labels, dimensions, format paths, status and material/production facts derived from the current document and geometry.

observed_values.dependency_manifest: not the same as the legacy export manifest

entries.release_disposition: Retain the operational reports, but add machine-readable dependency status rather than treating a successful file-write manifest as rights clearance.
evidence_needed: Field-level report provenance and status propagation
Stable relation between production records, canonical model and artifacts
Dependency-manifest integration with failure-closed export

entries.subject: B15 lightweight chair symbols and S1/S1J retained/export-preparation bodies
entries.output_effect: Displays low-detail plan symbols and can prepare five-box S1/S1J bodies while leaving all special-chair solids unsupported.
entries.release_disposition: Retain solely as accepted B15 behavioural and performance reference. The independent S1 package gate is not inherited by, and does not clear, this legacy representation.
evidence_needed: Resolution of every first-S1/core register gate for a new package
Explicit decision whether legacy symbols/bodies remain comparison-only
Output-specific manifest if any legacy representation is distributed as production geometry

entries.subject: Project filenames, object labels, report headings and exporter-added boilerplate
entries.output_effect: Adds human-readable names, field headings, path metadata and format-specific material around or within generated artifacts.
entries.release_disposition: Inventory project-authored and exporter-added boilerplate separately from geometry; remove, replace, attribute or record any third-party embedded material before positive status.
evidence_needed: Artifact inspection for headers, comments, metadata, logos, fonts and identifiers
Authorship/licence record for deliberate embedded content
Deterministic boilerplate tests by format

entries.subject: User-supplied assets and FreeCAD/exporter material that may enter an artifact
entries.output_effect: May introduce third-party geometry, text rendering, fonts, metadata or format boilerplate independently of the macro's railway calculations.

observed_values.tracked_third_party_cad_or_scan_asset: none identified in this bounded register
observed_values.future_user_inputs: must be declared per output rather than assumed clear

entries.release_disposition: Require the output manifest to identify retained user assets and deliberately embedded third-party material; do not infer authority from successful import or export.
evidence_needed: Input and embedded-asset enumeration for the exact workflow
Applicable FreeCAD/exporter licence and output-boilerplate review
User declaration and permission status for retained third-party inputs

entries.subject: Legacy B14/B15 output dependency status and non-copyright review
entries.output_effect: Controls whether any precisely named historical workflow can receive project-cleared status for redistribution, production or publication.
entries.release_disposition: Leave legacy output uncleared unless a deliberately selected workflow is audited through the current manifest and non-copyright gates; do not attempt an unbounded retrospective declaration.
evidence_needed: Exact advertised subject, version, artifacts and intended uses
Complete validated output dependency manifest
Territory-specific non-copyright reviews and explicit owner acceptance

entries.subject: Immutable B14 oracle and accepted B15 behavioural-reference boundary
entries.output_effect: Determines which historical implementation and chair-display variation an oracle, benchmark, document or artifact actually represents.
entries.release_disposition: Keep version roles and hashes explicit. Behavioural acceptance, benchmark reproducibility and GPL distribution do not confer project-cleared status on either version's output.
evidence_needed: Version-specific output subject and complete dependency set
Recorded equivalence and intentional-difference evidence
Independent release decision for each advertised legacy path
